import React,{useState,useEffect,useRef}from"react";import"../styles/GeneralChat.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const GeneralChat=()=>{const[messages,setMessages]=useState([]);const[input,setInput]=useState("");const chatEndRef=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{setMessages([{sender:"ai",text:"Hi 👋 I’m your AI mental health assistant. How are you feeling today?"}]);},[]);useEffect(()=>{var _chatEndRef$current;(_chatEndRef$current=chatEndRef.current)===null||_chatEndRef$current===void 0?void 0:_chatEndRef$current.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth"});},[messages]);const detectMood=text=>{const t=text.toLowerCase();if(t.includes("happy")||t.includes("good")||t.includes("great"))return"happy";if(t.includes("sad")||t.includes("down")||t.includes("cry"))return"sad";if(t.includes("angry")||t.includes("mad")||t.includes("furious"))return"angry";if(t.includes("anxious")||t.includes("stress")||t.includes("worried"))return"anxious";return null;// ❗ important
};const getAIReply=mood=>{if(!mood)return"I’m listening 💙 Tell me more about what’s on your mind.";const replies={happy:"That’s wonderful 🌟 What made you feel happy?",sad:"I’m really sorry 💙 Want to share what’s bothering you?",angry:"That sounds frustrating 😔 Let’s slow down together.",anxious:"That can be overwhelming 😟 What’s making you anxious?"};return replies[mood];};const saveMood=mood=>{if(!mood)return;const history=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("moodHistory"))||[];history.push({mood,time:new Date().toISOString()});localStorage.setItem("moodHistory",JSON.stringify(history));};const handleSend=()=>{if(!input.trim())return;setMessages(prev=>[...prev,{sender:"user",text:input}]);const mood=detectMood(input);saveMood(mood);setTimeout(()=>{setMessages(prev=>[...prev,{sender:"ai",text:getAIReply(mood)}]);},600);setInput("");};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chat-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chat-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chat-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"\uD83E\uDDE0"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"General Chat"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chat-body",children:[messages.map((msg,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chat-bubble ".concat(msg.sender),children:msg.text},i)),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{ref:chatEndRef})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chat-input",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:input,onChange:e=>setInput(e.target.value),placeholder:"Type how you feel...",onKeyDown:e=>e.key==="Enter"&&handleSend()}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleSend,children:"Send"})]})]})});};export default GeneralChat;
